CREATE TABLE dsa_keys (key_name VARCHAR(255), key_value TEXT);
SELECT key_value FROM dsa_keys WHERE key_name = 'myDSAkey';
CREATE TABLE key_metadata (key_name VARCHAR(255) PRIMARY KEY, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
SELECT key_value FROM dsa_keys WHERE key_name IN (SELECT key_name FROM key_metadata WHERE created_at > '2023-01-01');
WITH recent_keys AS (SELECT key_name FROM key_metadata WHERE created_at > CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '7 days') SELECT key_value FROM dsa_keys WHERE key_name IN (SELECT key_name FROM recent_keys);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dsa_keys WHERE key_name = 'mySecondDSAkey';
